daily_reports_end_rest_required.name: daily_reports_end_rest_required
daily_reports_end_rest_required.value: "daily_reports"."end_reported_at" IS NULL OR "daily_reports"."end_rest_location" IS NOT NULL

shifts_confirmed_has_approver.name: shifts_confirmed_has_approver
shifts_confirmed_has_approver.value: "shifts"."status" <> 1 OR ("shifts"."confirmed_by" IS NOT NULL AND "shifts"."confirmed_at" IS NOT NULL)

vehicles_ownership_exclusive.name: vehicles_ownership_exclusive
vehicles_ownership_exclusive.value:
("vehicles"."ownership_type" = 0 AND "vehicles"."owner_company_id" IS NOT NULL AND "vehicles"."owner_user_id" IS NULL)
         OR ("vehicles"."ownership_type" = 1 AND "vehicles"."owner_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "vehicles"."owner_company_id" IS NULL)
